features.name: logical_and inside sensitivity list
features.description: Code should include an always block with an event expression using && operator to combine two signals

features.name: workaround wire for sensitivity list with compound expression
features.description: Code should include a wire assignment of a logical AND expression followed by an always block using that wire in its sensitivity list
features.snippet:
wire temp = a && b;
always @(temp or posedge clk)
